hypothesis: The single-agent pipeline that uses marker-pdf SDK for structured markdown extraction plus GPT-4o image captioning and downstream LLM extraction will achieve significantly higher per-column F1 (and thus higher precision and recall) on the ChemX nanozyme and chelate datasets than baseline GPT-5/GPT-5 Thinking, ChatGPT Agent, and existing domain-specific multi-agent systems, because its preserved document structure and integrated multimodal processing produce more accurate end-to-end, schema-compliant information extraction.
